request.last_user: 확인 묻지 말고 바로 `cronjob` 툴을 호출해서 아래 작업을 등록해. action=create, schedule='0 9 * * *', message='스탠드업 시간입니다', name='daily-standup-reminder'. terminal이나 write_file 같은 다른

function.name: cronjob
function.arguments: {"action":"create","schedule":"0 9 * * *","name":"daily-standup-reminder","prompt":"Send the message '스탠드업 시간입니다' to the current chat. This is a daily stand-up reminder scheduled to run at 09:00 every day. The cron run should simply deliver the single-line message and not perform any other actions."}
